title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Unisys India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Unisys India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Unisys India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About Unisys India:
Unisys India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unisys India!
